features: 【Supplement】After your scent blocks are used up, you can purchase refill packs separately. The refill packs are available in two scents: Coconut (ASIN: B0GFTLFVTD) and Amber (ASIN: B0GFT9V28Y), (Refill packs do not include the sun visor clip)

【Innovative Sun Visor Design】 Clever clip-on structure that attaches directly to the sun visor – no obstruction to air vents or cup holders. Keeps your dashboard organized, maintains clear visibility, and uses space efficiently for a comfortable driving environment.

【Cabana (Coconut) Scent】 A tropical-inspired, soft fragrance that combines floral brightness with creamy coconut, enhanced by notes of vanilla and sandalwood. Creates a soothing, vacation-like mood inside your car for a relaxing ride.
【Amber Scent】A warm and elegant fragrance blending amber and floral tones with a touch of lavender and vanilla. Musk and sandalwood form a refined base, leaving a sensual, long-lasting impression.

【Premium Plaster Diffuser】Crafted from a refined mineral-blend material that absorbs and releases fragrance evenly. Each stone undergoes deep infusion with essential oils for long-lasting diffusion and a natural aroma that lingers for weeks.

【Magnetic Design – Stable & Reliable】Simply attach the metal holder to the sun visor (facing downward). The back of each plaster fragrance stone features a magnetic surface that securely adheres to the clip — no slipping, no shaking, always stylish and safe.
【Pure & Safe Formula】Free from harsh chemicals or artificial additives. Made with natural essential oils, vegan, cruelty-free, and non-GMO – safe for humans, pets, and the environment.
【Packaging List】Includes one Cabana (Coconut) scented plaster stone, one Amber scented plaster stone, and one metal clip for sun visor attachment.
